# TaskFlow

TaskFlow is a role-based and skill-based learning roadmap generator and milestone tracker designed to help developers plan their career goals.

## Core Features
- Role-based learning tracks (Frontend, DevOps, Backend, and more)
- Interactive milestone diagrams and progress tracking
- In-depth articles and guides on fundamental development concepts
- Comparison tool to analyze different learning paths side by side

## Main Links
- [TaskFlow Homepage](https://task-flow-by-hitarth.vercel.app/)
- [Taskflows Directory](https://task-flow-by-hitarth.vercel.app/taskflows)
- [Guides Index](https://task-flow-by-hitarth.vercel.app/guides)
- [Compare Paths Page](https://task-flow-by-hitarth.vercel.app/compare)
- [Changelog](https://task-flow-by-hitarth.vercel.app/changelog)
